subcodes.first_line: O thou daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letter was considered. On account of the lack of time.... The spiritual assemblies which are organized
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه مرقوم ملاحظه گردید از عدم فرصت جواب مختصر مرقوم میگردد و آن
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @contention and conflict, @House of Justice, @importance of community building
